title: NSE BankNifty: 98:1 Settlement Gap at 2-Day Expiry — Tokenized Derivative Structural Fragility

The combination of near-expiry timing, maximum extraction flag, and 98:1 settlement gap means the BankNifty expiry event is the highest-pressure Indian market signal in the current engine cycle.
